feedback.text: Hi, please also consider protecting video games, for example, if i wanna play a computer game from my childhood like 40 years later, but it turns out the company that owns the game, decided to kill it, and now i cant play the game anymore. and i couldn't play the game anymore, even if I've already paid for the game. for example halo series, the older ones. it would be awesome to be able to play those in my retirement, or late adulthood, after buying them as a teen, and then i cant even play them anymore
